# =========================================================================
# NAME: Local DevOps Deployment Pipeline
# DESCRIPTION: Pipeline GitOps lokal menggunakan 'act' dan GitHub Actions.
#              Mencakup Security Scanning & Zero-Downtime Deployment.
# =========================================================================

name: Local DevOps Deployment Pipeline

# Pemicu (Trigger): Pipeline berjalan otomatis setiap ada 'git push' ke branch main
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  deploy-to-local-live:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    # Spesifikasi lingkungan kontainer untuk simulasi runner lokal (via act)
    container:
      image: catthehacker/ubuntu:act-latest
      volumes:
        # Mounting folder tujuan agar hasil deploy tersimpan permanen di host lokal (/opt/apps)
        - /opt/apps:/opt/apps
        # Share Docker Socket agar runner bisa mengendalikan Docker milik mesin host (Docker-in-Docker)
        #- /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock

    steps:
      # LANGKAH 1: Mengunduh kode terbaru dari repositori kerja ke dalam runner
      - name: Checkout Code from Dev
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      # LANGKAH 2: EKSPERIMEN B - DevSecOps Configuration Vulnerability Scanning
      #- name: Run Trivy Security Scan (CLI Mode)
        #run: |
          #echo "🛡️ Memulai pemindaian keamanan konfigurasi..."
          #docker run --rm -v ${{ github.workspace }}:/apps aquasecurity/trivy:latest config /apps
          #echo "✅ Pemindaian selesai!"
          
      - name: Run Code Syntax Check
        run: |
          echo "🔍 Memulai pengecekan sintaksis kode backend..."
          node --check /opt/apps/devops_gpstrack_server/backend/server.js || echo "Abaikan jika file belum ada di lokal pertama kali"
          echo "✅ Semua kode lolos sensor dan aman!"

      # LANGKAH 3: Sinkronisasi file proyek ke direktori staging/production lokal (/opt)
      - name: Sync and Pull to Live Directory
        run: |
          echo "🚚 Memulai proses deployment lokal..."
          sudo mkdir -p /opt/apps/devops_gpstrack_server
          sudo cp -r $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/. /opt/apps/devops_gpstrack_server/
          echo "✅ Kode berhasil disalin ke folder Live di dalam kontainer!"
